title: docs: update CLAUDE.md subagent registry
body:
## Overview

Add new subagents to the registry table.

## Expected Behavior

Registry reflects all current subagents.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All subagents listed
- [ ] Status column up to date

## Files to Modify

- .claude/CLAUDE.md

## Blocked By

- None

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Change committed
